title: rubus × pseudopilifer
intro: Rubus × pseudopilifer is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The plant is known for its antioxidant properties and medicinal value. The leaves and stems of Rubus × pseudopilifer contain anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as improved cardiovascular health and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being.
